Refactored the code into separate components. Here's what changed:

## Created Components:

1. **`src/components/AppLayout.tsx`** — Shared layout with sidebar, navigation, header, and main content structure
2. **`src/components/evaluations/ContentPlaceholder.tsx`** — Shared placeholder component
3. **Individual evaluation components:**

   - `src/components/evaluations/TextToSpeechEvaluation.tsx`
   - `src/components/evaluations/LLMEvaluation.tsx`
   - `src/components/evaluations/VoiceSimulationEvaluation.tsx`
   - `src/components/evaluations/ChatSimulationEvaluation.tsx`

## Updated:

- **`src/app/page.tsx`** — Simplified to use the new components with a switch statement to render the appropriate evaluation component

Each evaluation type now has its own component file, making it easier to maintain and extend. The layout is shared, and the main page handles routing between evaluation types.

No linter errors. The refactoring is complete and ready to use.

```diff
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={handleEvaluate}
+           className="h-10 px-6 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity"
+         &gt;
+           Evaluate
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
+       {deleteDialogOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;DeleteConfirmationDialog
+           onConfirm={() =&gt; deleteRow(deleteDialogOpen)}
+           onCancel={() =&gt; setDeleteDialogOpen(null)}
+         /&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ function DeleteConfirmationDialog({
+   onConfirm,
+   onCancel,
+ }: {
+   onConfirm: () =&gt; void;
+   onCancel: () =&gt; void;
+ }) {
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50" onClick={onCancel}&gt;
+       &lt;div
+         className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl p-6 max-w-md w-full mx-4 shadow-lg"
+         onClick={(e) =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}
+       &gt;
+         &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-2"&gt;Delete Row&lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-[13px] text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+           Are you sure you want to delete this row? This action cannot be undone.
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={onCancel}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors"
+           &gt;
+             Cancel
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={onConfirm}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity"
+           &gt;
+             Delete
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
    );
  }
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Created the Speech-to-Text evaluation UI with the requested features:

## Features implemented:

1. **Audio file upload and text input rows** — Each row has:
   - A numbered badge
   - An "Upload Audio" button that opens a file picker
   - A text input for the reference transcription
   - A delete button (hidden when only one row exists)

2. **Always one row** — At least one row is always present

3. **Add more rows** — "Add Row" button at the bottom

4. **Evaluate button** — Primary button to start evaluation

5. **Delete with confirmation** — Clicking delete opens a modal dialog asking for confirmation

6. **Design theme** — Matches the existing theme:
   - Uses `border-border`, `bg-muted`, `text-muted-foreground`
   - Consistent spacing and typography (`text-[13px]`, `text-[15px]`)
   - Hover states and transitions
   - Rounded corners (`rounded-xl`, `rounded-md`)

The component is ready to use. The file input is hidden and triggered by the upload button, and selected filenames are shown on the button (truncated if too long).

```diff
    const addRow = () =&gt; {
+     // Validate existing rows
+     const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();
+     rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {
+       if (!row.audioFile || !row.text.trim()) {
+         invalidIds.add(row.id);
+       }
+     });
+ 
+     if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {
+       // Highlight invalid rows
+       setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);
+       return; // Don't add new row if validation fails
+     }
+ 
+     // Clear validation errors and add new row
+     setInvalidRowIds(new Set());
      const newId = Date.now().toString();
      setRows([...rows, { id: newId, audioFile: null, text: "" }]);
```

---


Added validation for the "Add another sample" button.

## Changes Made:

1. **Added validation state** — Tracks which rows have validation errors using a `Set` of row IDs.

2. **Modified `addRow` function** — Before adding a new row:
   - Validates all existing rows
   - Checks if any row is missing audio (`!row.audioFile`) or has empty text (`!row.text.trim()`)
   - If validation fails, highlights invalid rows with a red background and does not add a new row
   - If all rows are valid, clears validation errors and adds the new row

3. **Auto-clear validation errors** — When a user fixes an issue:
   - Uploading an audio file clears the error for that row
   - Entering text clears the error for that row

4. **Visual feedback** — Invalid rows are highlighted with:
   - Red border (`border-red-500`)
   - Red background (`bg-red-500/10`)

When "Add another sample" is clicked, any existing rows missing audio or text are highlighted in red, and a new row is only added if all existing rows are valid.

```diff
+         newSet.delete(provider);
+       } else {
+         newSet.add(provider);
+       }
+       return newSet;
+     });
+   };
```

Added a provider selection section before the Evaluate button.

## Changes Made:

1. **Added providers constant** — List of all available providers: deepgram, openai, cartesia, elevenlabs, groq, google, sarvam

2. **Added state management** — `selectedProviders` state initialized with all providers selected by default

3. **Added toggle function** — `toggleProvider` function to select/unselect providers

4. **Added Provider Selection UI** — Before the Evaluate button:
   - Section title "Select Providers"
   - Buttons for each provider displayed in a flex wrap layout
   - Selected providers have accent background (`bg-accent`)
   - Unselected providers have muted styling with hover effects
   - Clicking a provider toggles its selection state

5. **Updated Evaluate handler** — Logs selected providers when evaluation runs

The UI matches the design theme with consistent spacing, typography, and colors. All providers are selected by default, and users can click to toggle them on/off.

```diff
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ 
+ type TextRow = {
+   id: string;
+   text: string;
+ };
+ 
+ const providers = [
+   "cartesia",
+   "openai",
+   "whisper",
+   "google",
+   "elevenlabs",
+   "sarvam",
+ ];
+ 
+ export function TextToSpeechEvaluation() {
+   const [rows, setRows] = useState&lt;TextRow[]&gt;([{ id: "1", text: "" }]);
+   const [deleteDialogOpen, setDeleteDialogOpen] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null);
+   const [invalidRowIds, setInvalidRowIds] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set());
+   const [selectedProviders, setSelectedProviders] = useState&lt;Set&lt;string&gt;&gt;(new Set(providers));
+ 
+   const addRow = () =&gt; {
+     // Validate existing rows
+     const invalidIds = new Set&lt;string&gt;();
+     rows.forEach((row) =&gt; {
+       if (!row.text.trim()) {
+         invalidIds.add(row.id);
+       }
+     });
+ 
+     if (invalidIds.size &gt; 0) {
+       // Highlight invalid rows
+       setInvalidRowIds(invalidIds);
+       return; // Don't add new row if validation fails
+     }
+ 
+     // Clear validation errors and add new row
+     setInvalidRowIds(new Set());
+     const newId = Date.now().toString();
+     setRows([...rows, { id: newId, text: "" }]);
+   };
+ 
+   const deleteRow = (id: string) =&gt; {
+     if (rows.length === 1) return; // Don't allow deleting the last row
+     setRows(rows.filter((row) =&gt; row.id !== id));
+     setDeleteDialogOpen(null);
+   };
+ 
+   const handleTextChange = (id: string, text: string) =&gt; {
+     setRows(rows.map((row) =&gt; (row.id === id ? { ...row, text } : row)));
+     // Clear validation error for this row if text is entered
+     if (text.trim()) {
+       setInvalidRowIds((prev) =&gt; {
+         const newSet = new Set(prev);
+         newSet.delete(id);
+         return newSet;
+       });
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   const toggleProvider = (provider: string) =&gt; {
+     setSelectedProviders((prev) =&gt; {
+       const newSet = new Set(prev);
+       if (newSet.has(provider)) {
+         newSet.delete(provider);
+       } else {
+         newSet.add(provider);
+       }
+       return newSet;
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const handleEvaluate = () =&gt; {
+     // TODO: Implement evaluation logic
+     console.log("Evaluating:", rows);
+     console.log("Selected providers:", Array.from(selectedProviders));
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       {/* Title Section */}
+       &lt;div className="space-y-2"&gt;
+         &lt;h2 className="text-2xl font-semibold tracking-tight"&gt;Text-to-Speech Evaluation&lt;/h2&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-muted-foreground text-[15px] leading-relaxed max-w-2xl"&gt;
+           Provide text inputs to evaluate TTS quality. Measure naturalness, prosody, and pronunciation accuracy.
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Text Rows */}
+       &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+         {rows.map((row, index) =&gt; {
+           const isInvalid = invalidRowIds.has(row.id);
+           return (
+             &lt;div
+               key={row.id}
+               className={&#96;border rounded-xl p-4 flex items-center gap-4 transition-colors ${
+                 isInvalid
+                   ? "border-red-500 bg-red-500/10"
+                   : "border-border bg-muted/10"
+               }&#96;}
+             &gt;
+               {/* Row Number */}
+               &lt;div className="flex-shrink-0 w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-muted flex items-center justify-center text-[13px] font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                 {index + 1}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Text Input */}
+               &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                 &lt;input
+                   type="text"
+                   value={row.text}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; handleTextChange(row.id, e.target.value)}
+                   placeholder="Enter text to synthesize"
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-3 rounded-md text-[13px] border border-border bg-background focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Delete Button */}
+               {rows.length &gt; 1 &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setDeleteDialogOpen(row.id)}
+                   className="flex-shrink-0 w-10 h-10 rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors flex items-center justify-center cursor-pointer"
+                   aria-label="Delete row"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={1.5}&gt;
+                     &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0" /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           );
+         })}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Add Row Button */}
+       &lt;button
+         onClick={addRow}
+         className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border border-dashed border-border bg-muted/20 hover:bg-muted/40 transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground cursor-pointer"
+       &gt;
+         &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={1.5}&gt;
+           &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 4.5v15m7.5-7.5h-15" /&gt;
+         &lt;/svg&gt;
+         Add another sample
+       &lt;/button&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Provider Selection */}
+       &lt;div className="pt-4 space-y-3"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+           &lt;h3 className="text-[13px] font-medium text-foreground"&gt;Select providers to evaluate&lt;/h3&gt;
+           &lt;span className="text-[12px] text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+             ({selectedProviders.size} selected)
+           &lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex flex-wrap gap-3"&gt;
+           {providers.map((provider) =&gt; {
+             const isSelected = selectedProviders.has(provider);
+             return (
+               &lt;button
+                 key={provider}
+                 onClick={() =&gt; toggleProvider(provider)}
+                 className={&#96;h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium border transition-colors cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 ${
+                   isSelected
+                     ? "bg-foreground text-background border-foreground"
+                     : "bg-background text-muted-foreground border-border hover:bg-accent/50 hover:text-foreground hover:border-border"
+                 }&#96;}
+               &gt;
+                 {isSelected &amp;&amp; (
+                   &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}&gt;
+                     &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5" /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 )}
+                 {provider}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             );
+           })}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Evaluate Button */}
+       &lt;div className="pt-6 border-t border-border"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={handleEvaluate}
+           className="h-11 px-8 rounded-md text-[14px] font-semibold bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer flex items-center gap-2 shadow-sm"
+         &gt;
+           &lt;svg className="w-4 h-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth={2}&gt;
+             &lt;path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M5.25 5.653c0-.856.917-1.398 1.667-.986l11.54 6.348a1.125 1.125 0 010 1.971l-11.54 6.347a1.125 1.125 0 01-1.667-.986V5.653z" /&gt;
+           &lt;/svg&gt;
+           Evaluate
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Delete Confirmation Dialog */}
+       {deleteDialogOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;DeleteConfirmationDialog
+           onConfirm={() =&gt; deleteRow(deleteDialogOpen)}
+           onCancel={() =&gt; setDeleteDialogOpen(null)}
+         /&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ function DeleteConfirmationDialog({
+   onConfirm,
+   onCancel,
+ }: {
+   onConfirm: () =&gt; void;
+   onCancel: () =&gt; void;
+ }) {
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50" onClick={onCancel}&gt;
+       &lt;div
+         className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl p-6 max-w-md w-full mx-4 shadow-lg"
+         onClick={(e) =&gt; e.stopPropagation()}
+       &gt;
+         &lt;h3 className="text-[15px] font-semibold mb-2"&gt;Delete row&lt;/h3&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-[13px] text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+           Are you sure you want to delete this row? This action cannot be undone.
+         &lt;/p&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={onCancel}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium text-muted-foreground hover:bg-accent transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Cancel
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={onConfirm}
+             className="h-9 px-4 rounded-md text-[13px] font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Delete
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+
```

Created the Text-to-Speech evaluation component. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Removed audio file upload** — Rows only have text inputs (no file upload button)

2. **Updated providers list** — Set to:
   - cartesia
   - openai
   - whisper
   - google
   - elevenlabs
   - sarvam

3. **Simplified data structure** — Changed from `AudioTextRow` to `TextRow` (removed `audioFile` field)

4. **Updated validation** — Only checks if text is empty (no audio file validation)

5. **Updated UI elements**:
   - Changed placeholder to "Enter text to synthesize"
   - Updated description to reflect text-only input
   - Removed all file-related functions and refs

6. **Maintained consistency** — Kept the same UI patterns:
   - Row numbering
   - Delete confirmation dialog
   - Provider selection with checkmarks
   - Validation highlighting
   - Evaluate button styling

The component matches the Speech-to-Text structure but only accepts text inputs. No linter errors.

Updated the file upload handler to call the presigned URL API. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Made `handleFileChange` async** — To handle the API call

2. **Added API call** — When a file is selected:
   - Reads `NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL` from environment variables
   - Calls `POST ${BACKEND_URL}/presigned-url` with the filename and content type
   - Handles errors appropriately

3. **Error handling** — Logs errors if the API call fails or the environment variable is missing

## Environment Variable Setup:

Add this to your `.env.local` file (or `.env`):
```
NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://your-backend-url.com
```

Note: In Next.js, client-side environment variables must be prefixed with `NEXT_PUBLIC_` to be accessible in the browser.

The API is called when a user selects an audio file. The presigned URL response is logged to the console; you can extend this to upload the file using the presigned URL if needed.

Updated the code to upload files to S3 and show a green checkmark on success. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Added upload status tracking** — State tracks `uploading`, `success`, or `error` for each row

2. **S3 upload implementation** — After receiving the presigned URL:
   - Uploads the file to S3 using `PUT` with the presigned URL
   - Sets the correct `Content-Type` header
   - Handles upload errors

3. **Visual feedback**:
   - Loading state: Shows a spinner and "Uploading..." text while uploading
   - Success state: Shows a green checkmark icon next to the button after successful upload
   - Button is disabled during upload to prevent multiple uploads

4. **Error handling** — Sets error status if the upload fails

The implementation handles different presigned URL response formats (`url`, `presignedUrl`, or `presigned_url`). When a user uploads an audio file:
1. The button shows "Uploading..." with a spinner
2. The file is uploaded to S3
3. A green checkmark appears next to the button on success

No linter errors. Ready to use.

Creating a Next.js API route to proxy the request and avoid CORS:


---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="write">

<details><summary>Tool use: **write** • Edit file: src/app/api/presigned-url/route.ts</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 43, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,43 @@
- 
+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
+ 
+ export async function POST(request: NextRequest) {
+   try {
+     const backendUrl = process.env.BACKEND_URL || process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+     
+     if (!backendUrl) {
+       return NextResponse.json(
+         { error: "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set" },
+         { status: 500 }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     const body = await request.json();
+ 
+     // Proxy the request to the backend
+     const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/presigned-url&#96;, {
+       method: "POST",
+       headers: {
+         "Content-Type": "application/json",
+       },
+       body: JSON.stringify(body),
+     });
+ 
+     if (!response.ok) {
+       const errorText = await response.text();
+       return NextResponse.json(
+         { error: errorText || "Failed to get presigned URL" },
+         { status: response.status }
+       );
+     }
+ 
+     const data = await response.json();
+     return NextResponse.json(data);
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error("Error proxying presigned URL request:", error);
+     return NextResponse.json(
+       { error: "Internal server error" },
+       { status: 500 }
+     );
+   }
+ }
+ 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

Created a Next.js API route to proxy the request and avoid CORS. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Created API route** — `src/app/api/presigned-url/route.ts`:
   - Proxies requests to the backend
   - Runs server-side, avoiding CORS
   - Handles errors

2. **Updated frontend code** — Changed the fetch call to use `/api/presigned-url` instead of calling the backend directly

## Environment Variable Setup:

You can use either:
- `BACKEND_URL` (server-side only, recommended for API routes)
- `NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL` (fallback, accessible in browser)

Add to your `.env.local`:
```
BACKEND_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000
```

The API route proxies the request server-side, so CORS won't block it. The frontend calls `/api/presigned-url` (same origin), which then calls your backend.

Try uploading a file again; the CORS error should be resolved.

Moved the language dropdown below the providers section for the whole evaluation. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Removed language from rows** — Removed `language` from `AudioTextRow` type and from individual row state

2. **Added component-level language state** — Added `language` state at the component level, defaulting to `"english"`

3. **Removed per-row language dropdown** — Removed the language dropdown from each row

4. **Added language selection section** — Added a new section below the providers with:
   - A "Language" label
   - A dropdown with English and Hindi options
   - Styled to match the design theme

The language dropdown is now a single control below the providers section and applies to the entire evaluation. No linter errors.

Updated the language dropdown styling. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Improved spacing**:
   - Increased top padding from `pt-2` to `pt-4`
   - Increased spacing between label and dropdown from `space-y-2` to `space-y-3`

2. **Better label styling**:
   - Added `block` class to make the label display as a block element

3. **Enhanced dropdown styling**:
   - Added `max-w-xs` to limit width
   - Increased horizontal padding (`px-4 pr-10`) for better spacing
   - Added `appearance-none` to remove default browser styling
   - Added custom chevron icon positioned absolutely on the right

4. **Custom dropdown arrow**:
   - Added a custom SVG chevron icon that matches the design theme
   - Positioned it on the right side with proper padding
   - Made it non-interactive with `pointer-events-none`

The dropdown now matches the design theme with proper spacing, a custom arrow, and consistent styling. No linter errors.

Updated the language selection to display the label and dropdown on the same row. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Changed layout to horizontal** — Switched from `space-y-3` (vertical) to `flex items-center gap-3` (horizontal)

2. **Removed block label** — Removed `block` from the label so it sits inline

3. **Adjusted dropdown width** — Changed from `w-full max-w-xs` to `min-w-[140px]` so it doesn't stretch full width

The label and dropdown are now on the same row with proper spacing. No linter errors.
